memoryArtifacts.headline: Robert IV de Dreux (1241-1282)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Robert IV de Dreux, né en 1241, mort en 1282, comte de Dreux et de Braine, fils de Jean Ier, comte de Dreux, et de Marie de Bourbon.

Il combattit avec Philippe III le Hardi, roi de France en 1272 lor …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert IV de Dreux於1241年出生在法國崔艾-吉洛易德時，他的父親Jean Ier de Dreux27歲，母親Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre21歲。他和Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1284年11月14日在他的家鄉享年43歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪艾斯布萊。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert IV de Dreux于1241年出生在法国崔艾-吉洛易德时，他的父亲Jean Ier de Dreux27岁，母亲Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre21岁。他和Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort至少有2个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1284年11月14日在他的家乡享年43岁，埋葬在法国皮卡迪艾斯布萊。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dreux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Druce
meanings: English: variant of   Drewes  , a surname of French origin.
Possibly an altered form of Dutch and German   Drewes  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert IV de Dreux was born in 1241, in Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France, his father, Jean Ier de Dreux, was 27 and his mother, Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre, was 21. He had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort. He died on 14 November 1284, in his hometown, at the age of 43, and was buried in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert IV de Dreux est né en 1241, à Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France, son père, Jean Ier de Dreux, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort. Il est décédé le 14 novembre 1284, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert IV de Dreux 1241 in Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean Ier de Dreux 27 und seine Mutter Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre 21. Er hatte mit Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 14. November 1284 im Alter von 43 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert IV de Dreux è nato il nel 1241 nel Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia, il suo padre, Jean Ier de Dreux, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort. Morì il 14 novembre 1284, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert IV de Dreuxが1241年にフランスセントアエウレ-エト-ロイルドレウックスで生まれた時，父Jean Ier de Dreuxは27歳，母Marie de Bourbon-Dampierreは21歳であった。彼はComtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfortとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1284年11月14日に故郷で43歳で死去し，フランスピカーディエイスンブレアインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert IV de Dreux(이)가 1241년 프랑스 세트르 우레-트-로이르 드레우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean Ier de Dreux(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1284년 11월 14일 그의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 브레이인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert IV de Dreux nasceu em 1241, em Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, França, seu pai, Jean Ier de Dreux, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort. Ele faleceu em 14 de novembro de 1284, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Braine, Aisne, Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert IV de Dreux родился в 1241 г. в местности дреукс, эуре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция, его отцу по имени Jean Ier de Dreux было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre, 21. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort. Он умер 14 ноября 1284 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности бреаин, эисн, пикарди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert IV de Dreux nació en 1241, en Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia, su papá, Jean Ier de Dreux, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Marie de Bourbon-Dampierre, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas con Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort. Murió el 14 de noviembre de 1284, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.
